chart.title: Greenhouse gas emissions per kilogram of food product
chart.subtitle: Greenhouse gas emissions are measured in kilograms of carbon dioxide-equivalents. This means non-CO₂ gases are weighted by the amount of warming they cause over a 100-year timescale.

GHG emissions per kilogram (Poore & Neme.descriptionShort: Global average greenhouse gas emissions (GHG) per kilogram of food product. This is measured in kilograms of CO₂-equivalents per kilogram of product (kgCO₂eq per kg).
GHG emissions per kilogram (Poore & Neme.citationShort: Poore and Nemecek (2018) – processed by Our World in Data
GHG emissions per kilogram (Poore & Neme.citationLong: Poore and Nemecek (2018) – processed by Our World in Data. “Greenhouse gas emissions per kilogram” [dataset]. Poore and Nemecek, “Reducing food's environmental impacts through producers and consumers” [original data].
